title: New steps in the modification of wood, utilizing sustainable formulations
author: ETA FLORENCE RENEWABLE ENERGIES
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This factsheet provides a glimpse on the latest achievements of NewWave in the production of modified wood using formulations based on fast pyrolysis-bio-oil (FPBO). In 2025, project partner Foreco conducted modified wood production on a pilot scale. This activity was carried out with the collaboration of BTG, which prepared and supplied the formulations, and InnoRenew, which will be responsible for subsequent analyses.
